variables.notes: No depreciation/amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore, no separate COGS D&A row should be added relative to the selected parent row 'Cost of Revenues'.

No explicit depreciation/amortisation row appears in the operating section for SG&A, administrative, selling, or R&D. Since no separate same-level D&A line is visible above financial lines, treat D&A as already embedded in the selected XSGA component rows and do not add any separate XSGA D&A row.
